race.comment: VILLE DE LUMIERE (10) charged home late only to miss in a photo two back over 1206m at Terang. Settled midfield but didn't quicken as hoped over 1300m at Swan Hill last start. Back in trip with the blinkers on looks a nice set up. Expect her to bounce back to form. TANGOETTE (6) capped a promising start to the campaign with a strong win over 1000m at Warracknabeal last time where she powered through the line. Building a strong bond with Linda Meech who is aboard again. Tough to hold out over the extra 100m today. THE KILL CLUB (5) started favourite but after showing pace tired late when resuming over today's journey at Hamilton recently. Has a solid second-up record so don't sack her after one mediocre run. FIRST FIFTEEN (8) has disappointed since an impressive first-up win at Sale three back. Freshened up and can bounce back to form without surprising. OUR LITTLE STAR (4) recorded a dominant all-the-way win at Balaklava last time. Needed that confidence booster - each-way hope.
